responsibilities: Plan and oversee subsurface exploration programs including soil borings, sampling, and in-situ testing for site characterization
Analyze soil and rock properties to develop foundation design recommendations for buildings, bridges, and infrastructure projects
Perform slope stability and settlement analyses using PLAXIS and GeoStudio to evaluate geotechnical risks
Prepare comprehensive geotechnical engineering reports summarizing findings, analyses, and design recommendations for clients
Design shallow and deep foundation systems, including spread footings, piles, and drilled shafts, to support structural loads
Conduct seismic site response analyses to evaluate liquefaction potential and ground motion amplification effects
Collaborate with structural and civil engineers to integrate geotechnical recommendations into overall project design
Perform field observation and construction monitoring to verify compliance with geotechnical design specifications
